pi_items.source: File system inspection and Glob search
Task description states: 'set the Dry Bulb High to 102.0°F'; current value in .inp file is 91°F (DRYBULB-HIGH field)
Task description states: 'Wet Bulb at Max to 75.0°F'; current value in .inp file is 67°F (WETBULB-AT-HIGH field)
Task description states: 'change their Cooling Sizing Ratio to 1.25'; all 5 Ground Floor HVAC systems currently have SIZING-RATIO = 1.15 in .inp file
Grep search found exactly 5 Ground Floor systems: Sys1 (PSZ) (G.S11), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.E12), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.N13), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.W14), Sys1 (PSZ) (G.C15)
eQUEST standard simulation output format; verified in verifier.py which checks for .SIM file creation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic 4-storey building sample model (eQUEST project titled 'Project 18' with 2013 annual run period). Current design day cooling conditions are 91°F dry-bulb and 67°F wet-bulb; the task targets updating these to 102°F and 75°F respectively to simulate extreme heat wave resilience. All five Ground Floor HVAC systems (identified by 'G.' in their names) currently have a sizing ratio of 1.15; the task requires updating them to 1.25 to provide increased safety margin. The project file is located at 4StoreyBuilding.inp in the data directory.
